title: ActiveCampaign vs Drip (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ActiveCampaign and Drip email marketing tools. See pricing, features, and which suits your business best.
intro: ActiveCampaign and Drip are both powerful email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs. ActiveCampaign excels as an all-in-one solution with integrated CRM and advanced automation, while Drip specializes in e-commerce email marketing with deep store integrations. Understanding their strengths will help you choose the right tool for your business.
choose_a_if: You need advanced automation workflows and lead scoring capabilities
You want integrated CRM functionality without additional tools
You're budget-conscious and prefer to start at $15/month
choose_b_if: You run an e-commerce store and need revenue attribution tracking
You want visual automation builders with onsite campaign features
You prioritize specialized e-commerce email marketing over general-purpose solutions

faq.a: It depends on your use case. ActiveCampaign is better for general businesses needing comprehensive automation and CRM features, with a higher G2 rating (4.5 vs 4.4) and lower starting price. Drip is superior for e-commerce stores specifically, offering specialized features like revenue attribution and e-commerce tracking that ActiveCampaign doesn't emphasize.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or Drip?
faq.a: ActiveCampaign is significantly cheaper, starting at $15/month compared to Drip's $39/month entry point. This makes ActiveCampaign the more cost-effective choice for budget-conscious businesses, though pricing scales with subscriber count for both platforms.

faq.q: Can I switch from Drip to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, most email marketing platforms including ActiveCampaign support importing subscriber lists and contact data from competitors like Drip. You'll want to plan your automation workflows carefully during the migration, as the two platforms have different automation builders and features that may require reconfiguration.
